scheme_name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Diploma)
page_title: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Diploma)

details: A scholarship scheme by AICTE, MoE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical diploma course in an AICTE approved institution. A maximum of two girl children per family are eligible to avail of the benefits. The benefits are provided for a period of maximum of 3 years for first-year admitted students and a maximum of 2 years for second-year admitted students through lateral entry.
This scheme is an attempt to give young women the opportunity to further their education and prepare for a successful future by empowering Women through knowledge, skill, and self-confidence.
benefits: per annum for every year of study, i.e. maximum 3 years for first-year admitted students and maximum 2 years for second-year admitted students, through lateral entry as lump sum amount towards payment of
college fee, purchase of computer, stationeries, books, equipment, software, etc.
No other additional grant will be payable instead of hostel charges medical charges, etc.
eligibility: The applicant must be pursuing either
the First year of the Diploma course
Second year of the Diploma course through lateral entry.
(from all sources) must not be more than
from the following 13 Union Territories and North Eastern States

i.e., Andaman and Nicobar Islands (UT), Jammu and Kashmir (UT), Ladakh (UT), Dadra and Nagar Haveli & Daman and Diu (UT), Lakshadweep (UT), Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, Manipur, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Nagaland, Sikkim, & Tripura will be given a scholarship by AICTE.

online: page of the National Scholarships Portal.
Guidelines for Registration will appear. Scroll to the bottom. Read carefully the undertaking. Accept the Terms. Click “Continue”.

A Registration Form will appear. (The fields marked as * are compulsory). Fill in the details and click “Register”. Your Application ID and password will be displayed. The same will also be sent as an SMS to your registered mobile number.
page of the National Scholarships Portal Enter your Application ID and password.
On the next screen, provide the OTP received on your registered mobile number. You will be directed to the Password Reset screen. Create a new password and confirm.
Click “Submit”. You will be directed to the “Applicant’s Dashboard”.

On the left pane, click “Application Form”. The fields marked as * are compulsory. Fill in the details and upload the documents. The verification of credentials of the students (caste, educational qualifications etc.) will be done through the DIGILOCKER facility of the MeitY, Govt. of India.
You can either click on “Save as Draft” to complete the application later. Else, click “Final Submit” to apply.
The student can track their payment status from the template “Know Your Payment” in the
either by indicating their Aadhaar Number, Bank Account number or NSP Application ID.

documents_required: Copy of HSC/12th certificate (In case of degree level).
Copy of ITI certificate (In case of lateral entry for diploma level).
Copy of Diploma certificate (In case of lateral entry for Degree level).
Download the Appendix from the pdf.

faqs.question: Is there a validity to the scheme benefits?
faqs.answer: The benefits are provided for a period of maximum 3 years for first year admitted students and maximum 2 years for second year admitted students through lateral entry.

faqs.question: How many slots are there in this scheme?
faqs.answer: A total of 5,000 scholarships are earmarked per annum under this scheme.

faqs.question: What would be the mode of payment of the scholarship?
faqs.answer: The payment of the scholarship will be through DBT.

faqs.question: Are there any additional grants that may be payable in lieu of hostel charges and medical charges?
faqs.answer: No other additional grant will be payable in lieu of hostel charges and medical charges etc.

faqs.question: I belong to a NorthEastern state. Am I eligible to apply for this scholarship?
faqs.answer: Yes. All eligible girls who submit the online scholarship form, from following 13 Union Territories and North Eastern States will be given scholarship by AICTE.

faqs.question: Is there a tie-breaker in case of multiple applicants for the last available slot?
faqs.answer: The procedure to be adopted for breaking ties (similar percentiles) shall be as under: - Age: In case qualifying examination percentile does not break ties, then the candidate of elder age will be ranked higher. Annual family income: If above method does not break ties, and then the lower annual family income will settle on in higher ranking for the scholarships.

faqs.question: Will I be eligible for the scholarship if I fail to get promoted to the next semester?
faqs.answer: No. The scholarship will be terminated in that case.

faqs.question: Can I apply offline for the scholarship?
faqs.answer: No. You need to visit https://scholarships.gov.in/ to apply.

faqs.question: Is there any application fee?
faqs.answer: No. The entire application process is completely free of cost.

faqs.question: Am I eligible for this scholarship if two of my girl siblings are availing the benefits of this scheme?
faqs.answer: No. You won’t be eligible in this case.

faqs.question: Do I need to complete the application in one sitting?
faqs.answer: No. You can save the application as draft and continue at a later time before the deadline.

faqs.question: How do I track the status of my application?
faqs.answer: You can check the same anytime by visiting the Applicant Dashboard and clicking “Track Status” in the left pane.

faqs.question: What should be the type and size of the documents to be uploaded?
faqs.answer: The format should be.pdf or .jpeg. The size of each document should not be greater than 200 kb.

faqs.question: In what cases a Bonafide Certificate from the institute is needed?
faqs.answer: The Bonafide Certificate is needed to be uploaded with the application in a case where the institute is located in a State/UT different from the domicile State/UT of the applicant.

faqs.question: How do I know if a field in the application form is mandatory?
faqs.answer: The mandatory fields have a red asterisk (*) mark at the end.

faqs.question: How do I prove that my Family Income (all sources) is less than Rs. 8 LPA?
faqs.answer: A valid income certificate issued by State/ UT Government need to be enclosed as a proof of income.
